PlayerID.description: The unique PlayerID of the player as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this player corresponds to (1=Regular Season; 2=Preseason; 3=Postseason; 4=Offseason; 5=All-Star)

Season.description: The NFL season for which these totals apply

Team.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the team that the player is on. Note: If this player is a free agent; this field is NULL

Position.description: The primary position of the player. Possible Values: C; CB; DB; DE; DL; DT; FB; FS; G; ILB; K; KR; LB; LS; NT; OL; OLB; OT; P; QB; RB; S; SS; T; TE; WR

PositionCategory.description: The category of the player's position (OFF; DEF; ST)

Activated.description: The total number of games that the player was active for in the season

Played.description: The total number of games played by the the player in the season

Started.description: Total games started (on offense or defense) by the player in the season

PassingAttempts.description: Total passes thrown by the player in the season

PassingCompletions.description: Total passes completed by the player in the season

PassingYards.description: Total passing yards by the player in the season

PassingCompletionPercentage.description: The percentage of passes completed by the player in the season

PassingYardsPerAttempt.description: Total average passing yards per attempt by the player in the season

PassingYardsPerCompletion.description: Total average passing yards per completion by the player in the season

PassingTouchdowns.description: Total passing touchdowns by the player in the season

PassingInterceptions.description: Total interceptions thrown by the player in the season

PassingRating.description: The passer rating of the player in the season

PassingLong.description: Total yards of longest completion by the player in the season

PassingSacks.description: The total number of times the player was sacked in the season

PassingSackYards.description: Total yards lost by the player in the season as a result of being sacked

RushingAttempts.description: Total rushing attempts by the player in the season

RushingYards.description: Total rushing yards by the player in the season

RushingYardsPerAttempt.description: Total rushing yards per attempt by the player in the season

RushingTouchdowns.description: Total rushing touchdowns by the player in the season

RushingLong.description: The longest rush by the player in the season

ReceivingTargets.description: Total receiving targets by the player in the season

Receptions.description: Total receptions by the player in the season

ReceivingYards.description: Total receiving yards by the player in the season

ReceivingYardsPerReception.description: Average receiving yards per reception by the player in the season

ReceivingTouchdowns.description: Total receiving touchdowns by the player in the season

ReceivingLong.description: The longest reception by the player in the season

Fumbles.description: Total fumbles by the player in the season

FumblesLost.description: Total fumbles lost by the player in the season

PuntReturns.description: Total punt returns by the player in the season

PuntReturnYards.description: Total punt return yards by the player in the season

PuntReturnYardsPerAttempt.description: Total average yards gained per punt return by the player in the season

PuntReturnTouchdowns.description: Total punt return touchdowns by the player in the season

PuntReturnLong.description: The longest punt return by the player in the season

KickReturns.description: Total kickoff returns by the player in the season

KickReturnYards.description: Total kickoff return yards by the player in the season

KickReturnYardsPerAttempt.description: Average yards gained per kick return by the player in the season

KickReturnTouchdowns.description: Total kickoff return touchdowns by the player in the season

KickReturnLong.description: Longest kick return by the player in the season

SoloTackles.description: Total defensive solo (unassisted) tackles by the player in the season

AssistedTackles.description: Total defensive assisted tackles by the player in the season

TacklesForLoss.description: Total tackles for loss by the player in the season. Note: these are tackles behind the line of scrimmage for loss of yards (including sacks)

Sacks.description: Total defensive sacks by the player in the season

SackYards.description: Total defensive safeties scored by the player in the season

QuarterbackHits.description: Total quarterback hits by the player in the season. Note: This is a defensive stat that includes sacks

PassesDefended.description: Total passes defended by the player in the season

FumblesForced.description: Total fumbles forced on defense by the player in the season

FumblesRecovered.description: Total defensive fumble recoveries by the player in the season

FumbleReturnYards.description: Total fumble return yards by the player in the season

FumbleReturnTouchdowns.description: Total fumble return touchdowns by the player in the season

Interceptions.description: Total defensive interceptions by the player in the season

InterceptionReturnYards.description: Total defensive interception return yards by the player in the season

InterceptionReturnTouchdowns.description: Total defensive interception return touchdowns by the player in the season

BlockedKicks.description: Total blocked kicks by the player in the season. Note: BlockedKicks include Field Goals and Punts but NOT Extra Points

Punts.description: Total number of punts by the player in the season

PuntYards.description: Total punt yards by the player in the season

PuntAverage.description: The average number of yards per punt by the player in the season

FieldGoalsAttempted.description: Total field goals attempted by the player in the season

FieldGoalsMade.description: Total field goals made by the player in season

FieldGoalsLongestMade.description: Longest field goal made by the player in the season

ExtraPointsMade.description: Total extra points made by the player in the season

TwoPointConversionPasses.description: Total successful two point conversion passes by the player in the season

TwoPointConversionRuns.description: Total successful two point conversion rushes by the player in the season

TwoPointConversionReceptions.description: Total successful two point conversion receptions by the player in the season

FantasyPoints.description: Fantasy points scored based on basic fantasy scoring system by the player in the season

FantasyPointsPPR.description: Fantasy points scored based on basic PPR fantasy scoring system by the player in the season

ReceptionPercentage.description: Total percentage of receiving targets that were receptions by the player in the season

ReceivingYardsPerTarget.description: Average receiving yards per target by the player in the season

Tackles.description: Total tackles (solo & assisted) by the player in the season

OffensiveTouchdowns.description: Total offensive touchdowns scored by the player in the season

DefensiveTouchdowns.description: Total defensive touchdowns scored by the player in the season

SpecialTeamsTouchdowns.description: Total special teams touchdowns scored by the player in the season

Touchdowns.description: Total touchdowns scored by the player in the season

FantasyPosition.description: The player's fantasy football position. Possible values: QB, RB, WR, TE, DL, LB, DB, K, P, OL

FieldGoalPercentage.description: Total field goal attempts made by the player in the season

PlayerSeasonID.description: Unique ID of PlayerSeason record (subject to change, although it very rarely does).  For a static ID, use a combination of SeasonType, Season and PlayerID.

FumblesOwnRecoveries.description: Total own fumble recoveries by the player in the season. Note: this fumble doesn't result in a turnover - the fumbling team recovers the fumble

PuntTouchbacks.description: Total punts that resulted in touchbacks by the player in the season

PuntInside20.description: Total punts downed inside the 20 yard line by the player in the season

PuntNetAverage.description: The average net yards per punt by the player in the season

ExtraPointsAttempted.description: Total extra point kicks attempted by the player in the season

BlockedKickReturnTouchdowns.description: Total blocked kick recovery return touchdowns for the player in the season

FieldGoalReturnTouchdowns.description: Total field goal return touchdowns by the player in the season. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

Safeties.description: Defensive safeties (sacks in end zone, solo tackles in end zone, blocked kicks that went out of bounds in the end zone)

FieldGoalsHadBlocked.description: Total field goals by the player that were blocked in the season

PuntsHadBlocked.description: Total punts by the player that were blocked in the season

ExtraPointsHadBlocked.description: Total extra point kick attempts by the player that were blocked in the season

PuntLong.description: The longest punt by the player in the season

BlockedKickReturnYards.description: Total blocked kick recovery return yards for the player in the season

FieldGoalReturnYards.description: Total field goal return yards by the player in the season. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

PuntNetYards.description: The net yards of the punts by the player in the season

ShortName.description: The first initial and last name of the player (J. Doe)

Humidity.description: The humidity percentage at the start of the game

WindSpeed.description: The wind speed at the start of the game (in MPH)

OffensiveSnapsPlayed.description: Total snaps this player played on offensive in the season. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

DefensiveSnapsPlayed.description: Total snaps this player played on defense in the season. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

SpecialTeamsSnapsPlayed.description: Total snaps this player played on special teams in the season. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

OffensiveTeamSnaps.description: Total offensive snaps this player's team played in the season. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

DefensiveTeamSnaps.description: Total defensive snaps this player's team played in the season. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

SpecialTeamsTeamSnaps.description: Total special teams snaps this player's team played in the season. Note: Snap counts are available the morning after the game.

AuctionValue.description: Player's dollar value in a $200 salary cap auction draft.

AuctionValuePPR.description: Player's dollar value in a $200 salary cap PPR auction draft.

TwoPointConversionReturns.description: Total successful two point conversion returns by the player in the season

FantasyPointsFanDuel.description: Fantasy points based on FanDuel's scoring system by the player in the season

FieldGoalsMade0to19.description: Total field goals of 0 to 19 yards made by the player in season

FieldGoalsMade20to29.description: Total field goals of 20 to 29 yards made by the player in season

FieldGoalsMade30to39.description: Total field goals of 30 to 39 yards made by the player in season

FieldGoalsMade40to49.description: Total field goals of 40 to 49 yards made by the player in season

FieldGoalsMade50Plus.description: Total field goals of 50+ yards made by the player in season

FantasyPointsDraftKings.description: Fantasy points based on DraftKings' scoring system by the player in the season

FantasyPointsYahoo.description: Fantasy points based on Yahoo's daily fantasy scoring system by the player in the season

AverageDraftPosition.description: The average draft position of the player in re-draft leagues

AverageDraftPositionPPR.description: The average draft position of this player in Points Per Reception (PPR) leagues.

TeamID.description: The unique ID of the team that the player is on. Note: If the player is a free agent; this field is NULL

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

FantasyPointsFantasyDraft.description: Fantasy points based on FantasyDraft's scoring system by the player in the season

ScoringDetails.description: The details of the scoring plays this player recorded in the season

AverageDraftPositionRookie.description: The average draft position of this rookie in Points Per Reception (PPR) leagues.

AverageDraftPositionDynasty.description: The average draft position of this player in dynasty drafts leagues

AverageDraftPosition2QB.description: The average draft position of this player in 2 Quarterback leagues
